iotsitewise.accesspolicy.CfnAbout: Creates an access policy that grants the specified identity (AWS SSO user, AWS SSO group, or IAM user) access to the specified AWS IoT SiteWise Monitor portal or project resource.

iotsitewise.accesspolicy.AccessPolicyIde.Description: The identity for this access policy. Choose an AWS SSO user, an AWS SSO group, or an IAM user.

iotsitewise.accesspolicy.AccessPolicyPer.Description: The permission level for this access policy. Choose either a `ADMINISTRATOR` or `VIEWER`. Note that a project `ADMINISTRATOR` is also known as a project owner.

iotsitewise.accesspolicy.AccessPolicyRes.Description: The AWS IoT SiteWise Monitor resource for this access policy. Choose either a portal or a project.
